title: The Kharijites at Shahrazur
description: I was told on the authority of Ziyad-'Awanah: Before al-Hasan left al-Kufah, Mu'awiyah came and halted at al-Nukhaylah.55 At that, the five hundred Haruriyyah56 who had been standing aside at Shahrazur with Farwah b. Nawfal al-Ashja'i said, "Since someone about whom there is no doubt has come, [let us[ march against Mu'awiyah and wage jihud57 against him." They approached, with Farwah b. Nawfal in charge of them, and entered al-Kufah. When Mu'awiyah dispatched some of the Syrian cavalry against them, they routed the Syrians.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
